official_ifs_requirements.requirement: UK registered government research organisations can apply for GBP50,000 to GBP250,000 to move viable public sector knowledge assets towards commercial readiness.
Competition is open to single applicants; grant is awarded to and administered by the applicant organisation.
Lead must be a UK registered Public Sector Research Establishment, UKRI wholly owned institute, or other eligible public sector body such as an ALB that undertakes research as a primary function.
Applicant must own or co-own the Knowledge Asset, have senior support to commit the organisation, and be able to complete the project and claim grant funding.
Subcontractors are allowed, but only with justification; they cannot be used to bypass lead eligibility.

local_evidence_readback.finding: CKAF is recorded as PUBLIC_SECTOR_RESEARCH_ORG_REQUIRED, not R&A direct-submit ready.
Eligibility text requires PSRE, UKRI wholly owned institute or eligible public sector body undertaking research as a primary function.
Matrix states CKAF must not be submitted as R&A and should only be monitored for partner-led knowledge-asset commercialisation.
No CKAF, GOTT, PSRE, public-sector research body, Rose Book, ALB or knowledge-asset lead evidence found.

drive_searches.result_summary: Returned unrelated SKILL.md file only; no CKAF lead, public sector research body, or Knowledge Asset evidence found.
Returned War Room/planning and unrelated technical/service files. No confirmed public-sector research organisation lead or senior support found.

route_action.reason: Official CKAF rules require an eligible public-sector research organisation/body lead and public-sector Knowledge Asset evidence. Current Aureon evidence does not confirm those gates.

next_actions: Do not submit CKAF directly as R&A.

Only change CKAF to draft-ready if an eligible public-sector research establishment, UKRI institute, ALB or public-sector body confirms lead status, Knowledge Asset ownership, senior support, and R&A role evidence.
If R&A is involved, treat it only as a subcontractor/partner role after lead eligibility and procurement/funding basis are documented.
controls: No unsupported public-sector lead claim made
No unsupported Knowledge Asset ownership claim made
No unsupported senior-support or subcontractor claim made
No IFS portal mutation, external email, upload, partner invite, or final submission performed
